header.title: Validation & Type Safety with Zod
header.description: Deterministic validation layer ensuring that all data entering the system conforms to the defined architectural contracts.

items.title: Runtime Type Safety
items.description: Bridging the gap between TypeScript's static types and actual runtime data from APIs or forms.

items.title: Single Source of Truth
items.description: Generate TypeScript types directly from Zod schemas to ensure perfect alignment.

items.title: Deterministic Validation
items.description: Transparent and predictable error reporting for invalid data structures.

pattern.title: Validation Pattern
pattern.description: Schemas must be located in the 'model/schema' directory of their respective slices.

items.title: Input Validation
items.description: Validate all incoming API responses and user inputs before they reach the state store.

items.title: Form Integration
items.description: React Hook Form integration using 'zodResolver' for robust UI-layer validation.

items.title: Contract Enforcement
items.description: Using schemas to define and enforce contracts between different system modules.
